description: Add control points to edges. Control points are added on all edges in the current building blocks set if < range > is not supplied.
notes: Requires a current building-blocks set: run 'building-blocks set create <name>' then 'building-blocks set select <name>' before any block/edge/face/point operation; otherwise FLAC rejects the command with 'Unused extra parameter'.

keywords.name: count
keywords.description: Bare positional integer. Add exactly i control points per each edge ( i must be a positive integer no greater than 20). Added control points will be evenly spaced.

keywords.name: use-size
keywords.description: Add a number of control points equal to the number of zones on each edge (see building-blocks edge size ).
